evals.prompt: Use R after the Python or R gate has been answered with R. Make a WER-EA evidence heatmap and mechanism figure package. Assume R/Rscript is not installed locally.
evals.expected_output: The assistant must respect the Python or R gate and must not use Python or any non-R plotting backend to draw a preview or export. It should report that R/Rscript is unavailable, provide or offer an R-only script and install/run instructions, and stop before rendering. The response should still describe the figure package contract if useful.

assertions.name: no_cross_backend_rendering
assertions.description: When R is selected and unavailable, no Python/matplotlib/seaborn/plotly preview, SVG, PDF, TIFF, or PNG is generated as a substitute.

assertions.name: selected_backend_blocker_reported
assertions.description: The response clearly reports the missing R runtime or package blocker and does not present a non-R figure package as completed output.

evals.prompt: Use Python after the Python or R gate has been answered with Python. Make a WER-EA dosage-window figure package with simulated template data. Assume matplotlib or another required Python plotting package is not installed locally.
evals.expected_output: The assistant must respect the Python or R gate and must not use R or any non-Python plotting backend to draw a preview or export. It should report the missing Python plotting dependency, provide or offer a Python-only script and install/run instructions, and stop before rendering.

assertions.name: no_cross_backend_rendering
assertions.description: When Python is selected and unavailable, no R/ggplot2/ComplexHeatmap/patchwork preview, SVG, PDF, TIFF, or PNG is generated as a substitute.

assertions.name: selected_backend_blocker_reported
assertions.description: The response clearly reports the missing Python runtime or package blocker and does not present a non-Python figure package as completed output.

evals.prompt: After resolving the Python or R gate, make a journal-ready WER-EA mechanism-map figure package from the provided source table and caption notes.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should respect the Python or R gate and produce or specify a complete figure package with figure_contract.md, source_data.csv or source_map.json, selected-backend plotting script, SVG/PDF/PNG/TIFF exports, caption.md, qa_report.md, and asset_manifest.md. It must run or require audit_figure_package.py before claiming the package is journal-ready.

assertions.name: complete_figure_package
assertions.description: The figure package includes contract, source data or source map, selected-backend script, export bundle, caption, QA report, and asset manifest.

assertions.name: audit_gate_before_ready_claim
assertions.description: The assistant does not call the figure package ready unless the package audit has passed.
